summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Strive 500 ETF (STXF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Large Cap index. The fund  tracks a market cap-weighted index of the 500 largest companies across all sectors in the US equity market. STXF was launched on Sep 14, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: ETF Architect Announces Change to the Strive 500 ETF (Ticker: STRV)
data.text: HAVERTOWN, Pa. , Jan. 12, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- (ETF Architect) – Effective on or about Friday, January 26, 2024, the Strive 500 ETF (the "Fund") will undergo a change to it benchmark.

data.title: Ramaswamy launches initiative to bring back meritocracy in America
data.text: Strive founder and executive chairman Vivek Ramaswamy discusses his new index fund designed to focus on excellence rather than politics on 'Varney & Co.' #foxbusiness #varney Subscribe to Fox Business...

data.title: Ramaswamy takes on Apple, Disney with new index fund to push 'excellence over politics' in boardrooms
data.text: Strive founder and executive chairman Vivek Ramaswamy launches the Strive 500 ETF, mandating the top 500 U.S. companies abandon "anti-American" policies.

data.title: Strive Launches Strive 500 ETF (NYSE: STRV), Mandating the Top 500 U.S. Companies to Focus on Excellence Over Politics
